modpacks.name: CABIN
modpacks.description:
CABIN - short for Create Above & Beyond In Newer - is a port and remaster of the 1.16 pack to new versions, with a variety of new tweaks and quality of life changes.

Including but not limited to:

Being on the latest version of create with new machines (Gold and Lead) and subchapters for the mechanics added in the 0.5 and 0.6 updates.
New quality of life recipes, tweaks, quests and features, with features up to trial chambers being factored in.
Dynamically loading compatibility scripts, allowing for lots of replay value.
A general cleanup of the modlist, making things run even faster.
Additional Integration
Localization Support
And More!
